commands.title: Open Folder
commands.summary: Open a local folder as the active workspace or add it to the current workspace.

commands.title: Clone Repository
commands.summary: Clone a remote repository into a local destination and optionally open it as the next workspace.

commands.title: Import Profile
commands.summary: Import settings, keybindings, snippets, and compatible state from a portable profile or competitor export.

commands.title: Restore from Checkpoint
commands.summary: Compare the current workspace against a saved checkpoint, then restore the selected scope with a visible rollback path.

commands.title: Open Command Palette
commands.summary: Open the universal command launcher without minting a second command id for imported keymaps or help surfaces.

commands.title: Open in Browser
commands.summary: Open the current docs or help destination in the system browser through the governed browser-handoff path.

commands.title: Toggle Terminal
commands.summary: Focus the bottom-panel terminal and ensure a workspace shell session is available.

commands.title: Toggle Explorer
commands.summary: Focus the left-sidebar file explorer for the active workspace.
